project_type: pnpm monorepo - Express 5 API + React 19 Vite frontend for AI-powered iOS/web app generation
build_system: pnpm workspaces with esbuild for API server, Vite for frontend, multi-stage Dockerfile
test_framework: vitest for API unit/integration tests (with Postgres), Playwright for E2E
build_command: pnpm run build (runs typecheck then builds all packages)
test_command: pnpm run test (vitest run in api-server with Postgres required)
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm install, 2. pnpm run typecheck, 3. pnpm run lint, 4. pnpm run build, 5. pnpm run test (requires Postgres at DATABASE_URL)
snapshot_or_generated_files: lib/api-client-react/ and lib/api-zod/ are generated from lib/api-spec/openapi.yaml via pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec run codegen
setup_instructions: pnpm install, cp .env.example .env, set DATABASE_URL and at least one AI provider key, pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. Postgres required for tests.
contribution_requirements: ESLint + Prettier enforced, TypeScript strict, consistent-type-imports required, no console.log (warn only for warn/error)
key_patterns: Zod validation middleware on routes, session-based auth with cookie, drizzle ORM for DB, SSE streaming for generation, multi-provider AI client with retry/fallback, OpenAPI spec as source of truth for API contracts
directory_structure: artifacts/ (api-server, promptios frontend, mockup-sandbox), lib/ (api-client-react, api-spec, api-zod, db, integrations-openai-ai-server, integrations-openai-ai-react), scripts/, .github/workflows/
